/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,TextEntryObject.xgde -o /workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux/CppPlatform/Extensions/TextEntryObject.xgde CMakeFiles/TextEntryObject.dir/Extension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextEntryObject.dir/JsExtension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TextEntryObject.dir/TextEntryObject.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux /workspace/Binaries/Output/Release_Linux/libGDCore.so
